MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN ROTUNDU'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; AND FOR AN AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANTS HITEN PATEL, SATKAR HOSPITALITY INVESTMENTS, INC, TRICON MANAGEMENT, INC, CIVIC CENTER MOTOR INN AND THEIR ATTORNEYS OF RECORD.
Appearances: Veronika Short of DPA Law Group (408.300.5770) for plaintiff and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopts in full the recommendation of Pro Tem Judge Mark Schreiber which is to grant the motion for sanctions in the amount of $1610 to be paid by defendants and their counsel. The court adds a due date of February 29, 2012 for payment. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
